title: Fuel and Emission Control Symptom Diagnosis - Engine Stall - Questionnaire

blocks.text: Fuel and Emission Control Symptom Diagnosis - Engine Stall - Questionnaire

rows: Situation at the time of occurrence (while driving, while stopped, and presence/absence of sound or vibration)
1) The engine stalls due to a muffled sound or vibration while decelerating or coming to a stop.
Engine stall occurs without vibration or noise.
Transient failure of the ignition coil relay (only for vehicles equipped with an ignition coil relay)
PGM-FI Main Transient failure of relay 1
Transient failure of LAF sensor relay (only for vehicles equipped with LAF sensor relay)
